title: Simple Voice Chat Player Voice Recorder (Server-Side)
description:
SimpleVoiceChat Player Voice Recorder (Server-Side)

Record Minecraft players’ voice chats on the server using the official Simple Voice Chat API. Saves decoded audio in timestamped files organized by player UUID. Reliable, efficient, and easy to use.
body:
VoiceRecorderPlugin

A lightweight and efficient plugin for recording player voice chats on Minecraft servers (Paper 1.21.10) using the MaxHenkel VoiceChat API. This plugin captures players' voice data in real-time and saves it as WAV audio files for playback, moderation, or archival purposes.

## **Please install JDK version 21 or higher.**

Features:

Real-time voice recording of players during voice chat sessions

Noise filtering to reduce background sounds

Scheduled partial saving of audio to prevent data loss

Full integration with MaxHenkel VoiceChat API

Compatible with Paper and Spigot servers

Integrated with bStats for plugin metrics and usage tracking

Perfect for server admins who want to enhance their Minecraft community experience with voice recording capabilities.
